heading: Step 1: Delete the custom role.
body:
- Click the **Custom Roles** tab.

- Click trash-o **Delete** next to the
  role you want to delete.

- Click **Delete** in the dialog box to confirm
  deletion.

You cannot delete a custom role in the following scenarios:

- When deleting the role would leave one or more child roles with no
  parent roles or actions.

- When deleting the role would leave one or more
  [Configure Database Users](mongodb-users) with no roles.
